summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No merge recommendation is safe because the artifact does not include Codex /review preflight, mergeability is unknown, and several PRs are broad or marked waiting on author. No fix artifact is emitted because none of the PRs has a narrow maintainer-safe replacement path proven by the compacted preflight artifact.

actions.reason: Missing behavior proof and missing merge preflight leave a maintainer decision on whether this docs-only PR is acceptable despite the failed proof gate.
Broad code delta and waiting-on-author status are explicit human-review gates in the job frontmatter.
The waiting-on-author label and automation-sensitive generated locale changes require maintainer or author follow-up before merge planning.

The session-state and compatibility-sensitive gateway change lacks the complete merge preflight required for merge_candidate, and its scope is too broad for a replacement fix artifact from this artifact alone.
Dirty-candidate breadth, compatibility/session-state risk, and missing merge preflight require maintainer review before merge or repair planning.

needs_human: #75054 needs maintainer decision because the docs-only PR has a failed Real behavior proof gate and low-signal-docs/needs-real-behavior-proof labels.
#75165 needs maintainer decision because it is an XL feature/library addition marked waiting on author.
#75351 needs maintainer or author follow-up because it is marked waiting on author and touches generated/automation-sensitive locale surfaces.
#75371 needs maintainer review because the gateway/session-state change is large enough and lacks Codex /review, hydrated comments, and mergeability proof.
#75662 needs maintainer review because it is a dirty-candidate broad lifecycle/session-state change without complete review preflight.
